videos.title: Sephiroth Needs to Take the First Phantom Train
videos.description:
You know, Sephiroth just needed to hop on the Phantom Train to get his value!  This Mardu Aristocrats deck makes sacrificing your friendly units fun!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-sephiroth-needs-to-take-the-first-phantom-train
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7230110#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/cIWjS
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/C5zy6
